prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，对物理类考生吸引力强；本省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争加剧；学校位于安徽省宣城市，属长三角区域，对广东考生有一定跨省吸引力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 32656 → 35597 → 26466 → 61020 → 46800. In 2024, due to adjustments in major groups (majors like Logistics Management with no subject restrictions lowered the ranking), there was significant fluctuation. In 2025, it rebounded to about 46800, showing large volatility in recent two years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 49 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 51 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 53, a slight expansion of about 3.9% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 79–83 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents, which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin heat ranking is 77th (average evaluation), with moderate short video exposure. In 2025, there was an abnormal signal of low attention (popular majors' admission score plummeted), but no obvious signal of score cutoff drop in 2026. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, corresponding to the Logistics Management major. Engineering majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology rely on the main campus's disciplinary foundation. Although the Xuancheng Campus has not been separately rated, its overall engineering strength is relatively strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended by society, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. The provincial Physics Category candidate count in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, part of the Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 46800, the 2026 expansion of about 3.9%, and the provincial Physics Category candidate increase of about 3.6%, the effects of expansion and candidate growth roughly offset each other. Considering the dual impact of the university's somewhat negative reputation and high major popularity on applications, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 48100, with a range of 47600–48600.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 47000), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Software Engineering and Intelligent Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (around 48600), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated around 9555 → 8305 → 8693 → 9380 → 8798, with an overall range of 8300–9600 in recent years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 8798, with no clear single-direction trend in the past 5 years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 6 students each year from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 4 students, a 33% reduction compared to 2025, which is significant and eases competition noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to upper-middle-level science and engineering institutions. For liberal arts students, it is an interdisciplinary choice. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin heat ranking is 77th (average evaluation), with no clear signal of increased popularity. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, but the History Category enrollment major (English) does not directly correspond. The university's overall engineering background has limited appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The English major belongs to the foreign language category, with generally lukewarm social popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, part of the Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Guangdong examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8798, a 33% enrollment reduction in 2026, and an approximately 11.6% increase in provincial History Category examinees, the enrollment reduction effect (easing competition) is stronger than the examinee increase effect (intensifying competition). However, taking into account the actual push of the significant increase in examinee numbers on competition, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 7100, with a range of 6600–7600.
